criteria.name: font_family_end_to_end_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Editing the font family end to end: entering a new font-family value updates the generated font-family line to the entered value, increases the override count by exactly one (measured immediately before and after), and re-renders the live terminal preview.
criteria.reasoning: Edited Font family to Fira Code; count became 1, generated line showed `font-family = Fira Code`, and preview remained live. Evidence: font-family-edit-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_setting_blocks_generated_line
criteria.description: Typing an invalid value into a validated setting shows an immediate inline message naming that setting, and no malformed line is emitted into the generated configuration.
criteria.reasoning: Invalid `#zzzzzz` showed inline `Use #RRGGBB.` validation and no malformed line was added. Evidence: validation-invalid-color-shared.png

criteria.name: category_round_trip_keeps_font_family
criteria.description: After editing font-family, switching to another category and back shows the same value in the control, the live preview, and the generated line without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: Colors → Fonts returned to Fonts with the edited family and generated line preserved. Evidence: category-roundtrip-shared.png

criteria.name: single_override_reset_flow
criteria.description: Resetting the edited font-family setting removes its generated line (or shows it empty), decreases the override count by exactly one, and returns the preview text to the default face, while every unrelated override stays unchanged.
criteria.reasoning: Resetting Font family restored JetBrains Mono, removed its line, and reduced the count while font-size remained. Evidence: single-reset-shared.png

criteria.name: theme_selection_end_to_end
criteria.description: Selecting a theme end to end: choosing a theme on the Colors page recolors the live terminal preview, adds a theme = the chosen theme line to the generated configuration, updates the override count, and enables the export actions if they were disabled.
criteria.reasoning: Selecting Dracula recolored the theme state, added `theme = Dracula`, and enabled exports. Evidence: theme-selected-shared.png

criteria.name: reset_all_restores_empty_state
criteria.description: After editing at least two settings in different categories, Reset all removes every generated override line, returns the override count to zero, restores "# No changes to the default config yet", restores the live preview to defaults, and disables the export actions.
criteria.reasoning: Reset all restored zero overrides, the no-changes comment, default controls/preview, and disabled exports. Evidence: reset-all-empty-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_restores_edited_settings
criteria.description: Reloading the page restores the same view and the previously edited settings from client storage: the edited controls, the live preview, the generated lines, and the override count all match their pre-reload state.
criteria.reasoning: After reload, Source Code Pro, font-size 20, both generated lines, preview state, and count 2 were restored. Evidence: reload-persistence-shared.png

criteria.name: sidebar_category_nav_keeps_workflow
criteria.description: Navigating between setting categories via the sidebar keeps the current category visibly identified, does not reload the document, and preserves in-progress override state across categories.
criteria.reasoning: Sidebar navigation visibly changed the active category while preserving edits across categories. Evidence: category-roundtrip-shared.png

criteria.name: copy_flow_feedback_without_mutation
criteria.description: With at least one override present: activating Copy shows visible feedback, and afterward the generated configuration text and override count are identical to their pre-copy values.
criteria.reasoning: Copy displayed `Configuration copied.` while the generated text and count stayed unchanged. Evidence: copy-feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: download_flow_saves_ghostty_config
criteria.description: With at least one override present: activating Download initiates a save for a file named ghostty-config without altering the generated configuration text.
criteria.reasoning: Download displayed `Downloaded ghostty-config.` and the generated configuration remained unchanged. Evidence: download-feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: primary_edit_or_export_flows_unavailable
criteria.description: Font-family editing, theme selection, Copy, Download, or Reset all cannot be completed from the visible UI controls.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Font editing, theme selection, Copy, Download, and Reset all were visibly operable. Evidence: font-family-edit-shared.png

criteria.name: font_family_edit_missing_or_duplicated
criteria.description: Entering a font-family value either fails to add a generated line or creates duplicate font-family lines for a single edit.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A single edit produced exactly one `font-family` line. Evidence: font-family-edit-shared.png

criteria.name: surfaces_desync_after_edit
criteria.description: After a setting edit, the control value, live preview, and generated line disagree about the same setting without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The edited control and generated line agreed, with the live preview still rendered. Evidence: font-family-edit-shared.png

criteria.name: category_switch_loses_selection_or_breaks
criteria.description: Switching sidebar categories breaks the layout or loses the active category identification / override values.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Category switching preserved the active category and override values without layout breakage. Evidence: category-roundtrip-shared.png

criteria.name: reset_all_leaves_broken_empty_ui
criteria.description: After Reset all, the generated-config panel is blank or broken with no empty-state comment and no disabled export state.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Reset all showed the empty-state comment and disabled export buttons. Evidence: reset-all-empty-shared.png

criteria.name: preview_and_config_disagree_on_theme
criteria.description: After selecting a theme, the live preview colors and the generated theme = line disagree about which theme is active.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The selected theme was Nord in both the live state and generated `theme = Nord` line. Evidence: theme-compare-apply-shared.png

criteria.name: sidebar_categories_cannot_reselect
criteria.description: After visiting another category, a previously visited sidebar category cannot be re-selected to show its settings form.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Previously visited Fonts was re-selected successfully and its form appeared. Evidence: category-roundtrip-shared.png

criteria.name: export_toast_blocks_with_no_exit
criteria.description: Copy/Download/Reset feedback blocks navigation with no dismiss path back to the editor.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Copy/Download feedback appeared without blocking the editor or navigation. Evidence: copy-feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: failed_invalid_edit_silent
criteria.description: An invalid setting edit provides no visible validation feedback and leaves the user without an explanation.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Invalid color input produced visible inline validation naming the requirement. Evidence: validation-invalid-color-shared.png

criteria.name: category_or_export_dead_end_requires_reload
criteria.description: Recovering from a category switch or export action requires a full page reload — the UI reaches a dead end.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Category switches and export actions returned to an operable editor without reload. Evidence: download-feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: export_import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: After editing at least two settings: Copy or Download the generated config, Reset all to empty, then Import that same text — controls, live preview, generated lines, and override count all match the pre-reset state.
criteria.reasoning: After reset, importing the exported three-line configuration restored all controls, generated lines, preview state, and count 3. Evidence: import-roundtrip-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Edit font-family, confirm the override appears, Undo once (override and count revert), then Redo once — the override returns on the control, preview, and generated line.
criteria.reasoning: Undo removed the newly edited font override, and Redo restored `font-family = Hack` with the control and count. Evidence: redo-state-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_jump_flow
criteria.description: Open the palette with Cmd+K or Ctrl+K, type enough of a setting name to match, choose the result, and land on that setting's category with the control focused.
criteria.reasoning: Ctrl+K opened the palette; searching `font family` and choosing the result returned to Fonts with the control focused. Evidence: command-palette-shared.png

criteria.name: profile_save_apply_flow
criteria.description: With at least two overrides: Save profile under a name, Reset all, then select that profile — the same overrides reappear in the generated panel, controls, and preview.
criteria.reasoning: Saved Work with two overrides, reset all, then Apply restored both overrides and count 2. Evidence: profile-apply-shared.png

criteria.name: import_round_trip_desyncs
criteria.description: After export → Reset all → Import of the exported text, controls, preview, and generated lines disagree about the restored overrides.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Imported controls and generated lines matched for theme, background, and foreground. Evidence: import-roundtrip-shared.png

criteria.name: field_contract_validation_blocks_bad_commit
criteria.description: Attempting to commit an out-of-contract value (for example font-size outside 4–60, cursor-style outside the closed enum, a non-#RRGGBB color, or an empty profile-name) shows inline validation naming the field, leaves the generated configuration without that malformed line, does not change the override count for the rejected value, and keeps the rest of the workflow operable without a reload; a subsequent valid in-contract commit emits the matching key = value line.
criteria.reasoning: Invalid color showed inline validation and did not alter the count/config; a subsequent valid color committed `background = #445566`. Evidence: validation-valid-followup-shared.png

criteria.name: validation_bypass_emits_bad_config
criteria.description: An out-of-contract value reaches the generated config or export artifact without the inline field validation the Ghostty contracts require.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The invalid color was blocked with inline validation and never appeared in configuration. Evidence: validation-invalid-color-shared.png

criteria.name: profile_rename_flow
criteria.description: Profile rename flow: save a profile, rename it via its Rename control to a new valid name — the list shows the new name with the same override count and applying it still restores the overrides; renaming it to another saved profile's name shows the conflict message and leaves both names unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Renamed Work to Personal with the same count; attempting duplicate Alt showed a conflict alert and preserved both saved names. Evidence: profile-rename-conflict-shared.png

criteria.name: theme_ab_compare_flow
criteria.description: Theme A/B flow: open Compare themes, select two different themes for sides A and B — both previews recolor differently; Apply side B adds theme = that theme to the generated configuration, recolors the main preview, and updates the override count; reopening and closing compare without applying leaves the configuration and count identical
criteria.reasoning: Compare showed distinct Dracula/Nord previews; Apply B produced `theme = Nord` and count 1, while close-without-applying preserved the existing count/config. Evidence: theme-compare-apply-shared.png

criteria.name: import_then_diff_flow
criteria.description: Import-then-diff flow: from zero overrides, Import config text containing at least two in-contract keys, then open Diff mode — each imported key appears with its default beside the imported value in the changed treatment, and the override count equals the number of imported keys
criteria.reasoning: After importing three keys from zero, Diff mode showed each key with Default and Current values and count 3. Evidence: import-diff-shared.png

criteria.name: rename_or_compare_controls_noop
criteria.description: The profile Rename control or the Compare themes surface (selectors or Apply) is missing, or activating it changes no visible name, preview, or configuration state.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rename changed the saved profile name, and Compare exposed distinct previews plus Apply controls. Evidence: profile-rename-conflict-shared.png

criteria.name: user_flows_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable defect in critical end-to-end user flows that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. 'Significant' means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: No additional significant browser-observable defect outside the covered criteria was observed. Evidence: import-diff-shared.png

criteria.name: desktop_two_pane_composition
criteria.description: At desktop width the composition establishes a two-pane settings-and-preview layout with grouped controls, sliders or inputs, color values, and monospace configuration output.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Desktop view visibly has grouped settings, controls, live preview, and a separate generated-config pane. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: first_viewport_emphasizes_form_and_preview
criteria.description: The first viewport gives greater visual emphasis to the categorized settings form and its generated-config preview than to secondary metadata, notes, or badges.
criteria.reasoning: yes — The settings form, terminal preview, and generated config dominate the desktop viewport. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: monospace_terminal_style_output
criteria.description: The generated-config output is monospace and uses a terminal-style color scheme (dark background, light text, colorized keys and values) rather than plain unstyled text.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Generated config uses a dark terminal panel, monospace text, and colorized values. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: three_distinct_type_roles
criteria.description: At least three distinguishable type roles are visible (section title, body text, secondary label) differing in size and/or weight.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Section headings, body copy, and secondary labels visibly differ in size, weight, and color. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: body_text_contrast_meets_aa
criteria.description: Primary body text meets a contrast ratio of at least 4.5 to 1 against its background in the editor.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Primary body text is high-contrast light text on dark surfaces; computed body color was rgb(247,244,250). Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: sentence_case_microcopy_with_numerals
criteria.description: UI microcopy is concise sentence-case text and uses numerals for counts (for example the override count), rather than Title Case or spelled-out numbers.
criteria.reasoning: yes — UI copy is concise and sentence case, with numerals such as “3 settings” and “0 overrides.” Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: generic_unstyled_editor
criteria.description: The editor renders as generic unstyled cards or framework-default styling with no deliberate settings-and-preview identity.
criteria.reasoning: no — The editor has deliberate branded chrome, grouped settings cards, terminal preview styling, and a generated-config panel. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: font_family_edit_causes_layout_jump
criteria.description: Editing the font-family setting causes overlapping or jumping content in the layout.
criteria.reasoning: no — Editing the font family left the form, preview, and output rectangles unchanged, with no overlap or jump observed. Evidence: font_family_edit_causes_layout_jump-shared.png

criteria.name: macos_window_chrome_composition
criteria.description: The app presents a desktop macOS-style application window: a translucent left sidebar with window-dot chrome and category icons, a titled content area with a back/forward history control, and a right-hand generated-config panel.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Desktop view visibly shows a rounded macOS-style window, red/yellow/green dots, translucent sidebar, titled content area, history controls, and right output panel. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: varied_control_types_in_grouped_sections
criteria.description: The settings form uses grouped sections with section titles and notes, labeled rows, and a visible mix of control types including sliders, number steppers with unit toggles, text inputs, dropdowns, pill toggles, switches, color pickers, a palette grid, and a repeatable-value list editor.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Grouped sections and switches, steppers, segmented controls, sliders, color inputs, and a palette grid were observed, but no repeatable-value list editor was visible. Evidence: terminal_controls-shared.png and colors-controls-shared.png

criteria.name: dock_hosts_live_terminal_preview
criteria.description: A macOS-style dock hosts a live interactive terminal preview that re-themes as settings change.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The bottom dock contains only two shortcut buttons; the live terminal preview is a separate main-panel region and the dock itself does not host it. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: mixed_icon_styles_present
criteria.description: Sidebar categories or control affordances mix icon styles - different icon weights or mismatched glyph sets appear across the UI.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Sidebar controls use icon imagery alongside distinct sparkle/glyph marks and external-link affordances. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: consistent_status_colors_and_legibility
criteria.description: Light and dark surfaces stay legible, and status colors are consistent across the UI (danger/reset actions in red, success feedback in green).
criteria.reasoning: yes — Dark and light surfaces remain legible; reset is red, live status is green, and feedback/status treatments are visually consistent. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: narrow_width_panes_stack_keeping_identity
criteria.description: At a narrow width (about 375 pixels) the sidebar, settings form, and generated-config panel stack while keeping the product identity, with no horizontal page scrolling.
criteria.reasoning: yes — At 375px the sidebar, settings content, preview, and output stack vertically with the Ghostty Config identity retained and no horizontal scrolling. Evidence: narrow_width_panes_stack_keeping_identity-shared.png

criteria.name: validation_copy_names_setting_and_range
criteria.description: Where a validation message is rendered, it names the setting and the accepted range or format rather than showing a generic rejection.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Invalid cursor color input produced “Use #RRGGBB.”, naming the required format. Evidence: validation_color-shared.png

criteria.name: placeholder_text_visible_in_ui
criteria.description: Placeholder or lorem text (for example "Lorem", "TODO", or template variable names) is visible somewhere in the shipped UI.
criteria.reasoning: yes — The profile dialog visibly showed the placeholder “Work setup.” Evidence: profile_rows_consistent_row_treatment-shared.png

criteria.name: diff_and_palette_chrome_craft
criteria.description: Diff mode marks changed keys with a clear changed treatment for default vs current values; the command palette is a centered overlay with a search field and scrollable result list; Undo/Redo/Import/Diff/Profiles sit in editor chrome without crowding the form or generated-config panel.
criteria.reasoning: yes — Diff mode visibly showed Default versus Current changed values, and the command palette appeared as a centered searchable overlay with a scrollable result list; editor chrome remained organized. Evidence: diff_mode-after-click.png and diff_and_palette_chrome_craft-shared.png

criteria.name: hardened_chrome_crowds_primary
criteria.description: Undo, Redo, Import, Diff, or Profiles chrome crowds or obscures the primary settings form or generated-config panel so the two-pane composition is lost.
criteria.reasoning: no — Undo, Redo, Import, Diff, Profiles, and Search remain in compact header chrome without obscuring the form or output panel. Evidence: desktop_layout-shared.png

criteria.name: compare_panes_equal_ab_labels
criteria.description: The Compare themes surface shows two equal-weight preview panes labelled A and B, each with its own theme selector and Apply control, clearly separated so the two themes read side by side
criteria.reasoning: yes — The Compare themes dialog showed equal-weight A and B panes, each with a theme selector, preview, and Apply control. Evidence: compare_panes_equal_ab_labels-after-open.png

criteria.name: profile_rows_consistent_row_treatment
criteria.description: Profile rows present the profile name, its override count, and Apply, Rename, and Delete controls in one consistent row treatment
criteria.reasoning: yes — Saved profile rows visibly contain the name, override count, Apply, Rename, and Delete controls in one consistent row. Evidence: profile_rows_consistent_row_treatment-after-save.png
